description: Playwright automation navigator: resolves the current API from live docs (playwright.dev), link map per area (locators, auto-waiting, network interception, storageState auth, test runner, trace viewer, connectOverCDP), robust-automation patterns, and driving an anti-detect browser (AdsPower/Kameleo) over CDP. Includes /playwright:check and a Playwright-keyword reminder hook. Defers general third-party doc verification to api-docs-first.

interface.longDescription:
Playwright automation navigator: current API from live docs (playwright.dev), link map (locators, auto-waiting, network interception, storageState auth, test runner, trace, connectOverCDP), robust-automation patterns, and driving an anti-detect browser (AdsPower/Kameleo) over CDP. Includes /playwright:check. Defers general third-party doc verification to api-docs-first.

Codex fidelity: 3 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).

name: playwright
